---
params:
  reportTitle: "Analysis"
title: "`r params$reportTitle`"
metadata-files: ["_fgcz_report.yml"]
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
library(ezRun)
library(DT)
library(tidyverse)

.dt <- function(df, caption = NULL, pageLength = 10L,
                filter = "none", rownames = FALSE, escape = TRUE, ...) {
  DT::datatable(
    data = df, caption = caption, filter = filter,
    rownames = rownames, escape = escape,
    class = "compact stripe",
    options = list(
      pageLength = pageLength,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = "tip",
      columnDefs = list(list(targets = "_all", className = "dt-left"))
    ),
    ...
  ) |> DT::formatStyle(columns = seq_len(ncol(df)),
                        `text-align` = "left",
                        `white-space` = "normal",
                        `word-wrap` = "break-word",
                        `max-width` = "300px")
}

.save_plot <- function(plot, name, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300) {
  if (!dir.exists("plots")) dir.create("plots", recursive = TRUE)
  ggplot2::ggsave(file.path("plots", paste0(name, ".png")),
                  plot = plot, width = width, height = height, dpi = dpi, bg = "white")
  ggplot2::ggsave(file.path("plots", paste0(name, ".pdf")),
                  plot = plot, width = width, height = height, device = "pdf", bg = "white")
}
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

# First

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

# Second

# Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```

:::
